frontmatter.title: The cubical model of type theory
frontmatter.meta: @mastersthesis{weinberger:2016, author = {Weinberger, Jonathan}, school = {Technische Universit\"{a}t Darmstadt}, url = {https://www2.mathematik.tu-darmstadt.de/~streicher/THESES/weinberger.pdf}, year = {2016}, month = nov, title = {The Cubical Model of Type Theory}, }
